use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF EXTRAVASATION RESULTING FROM IV ANTHRACYCLINE CHEMOTHERAPY

indications.text:
Extravasation
Totect® is indicated for the treatment of extravasation resulting from intravenous anthracycline
chemotherapy.
Cardiomyopathy
Totect is indicated for reducing the incidence and severity of cardiomyopathy associated with doxorubicin
administration in women with metastatic breast cancer ...
